channel.title: SPL - West Seattle Branch
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - West Seattle Branch

item.title: How to Manage End-of-Life Planning with Ill or Reluctant Loved Ones
item.description:
Thursday, March 19, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: West Seattle Branch

Join us to learn about ways to approach end-of-life planning with loved ones.

Event details

item.title: How To Write an Obituary (your own or someone else’s)
item.description:
Sunday, March 22, 2026 at 3 PM

Location: West Seattle Branch

This workshop includes ideas for how to interview family members and what can be learned by writing our own obituary.

Event details

item.title: Medicare Made Clear
item.description:
Tuesday, March 24, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: West Seattle Branch

Everything you need to know about Medicare!

Event details
